claims.text: We claim: 1. A topical lotion, comprising: about 0.005 to 1.0 wt. % fluticasone, or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt or ester thereof; about 4.0 to 6.0 wt. % of a C 14 -C 20 fatty alcohol or mixture...
17. A method of treating a skin condition treatable by fluticasone, comprising topically administering to a patient in need thereof a lotion according to claim 14 .
